  • NEW Grab Merchant List Malaysia template.xlsx

SLA

Entity Origin

SLA

3 - 5 {{glossary.working days}}

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel

Activation

1

Merchant submits a GrabPay application via their own Xendit Dashboard.

Merchant

2

Request appears in Admin Dashboard > Channel Approvals and Activations.

MO

3

Go to Action > Export and update Status

4

Select MY GrabPay and the relevant date range to download merchant data.

MO Process Merchant’s Request

5

Access the exported file via the provided Drive link.

6

Copy/Paste data into the shared sheet :


Complete two mandatory tabs:

  1. Merchant Level

    1. TPA MCC should follow the MCC of that particular merchant

    2. Check the Restricted Industries List to see if additional information needs to be provided

  2. Store level

  • Trading name should follow Business Name. This name will be seen when the end user makes payment.

7

GrabPay reviews the batch. Feedback is sent via email with the subject: [GPMY SalesOps] GrabPay x Payex-Xendit ONA Batch Date: DDMMYYY

Partner

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

Once GrabPay approves, navigate to Admin Dashboard > Channel Approvals and Activations.

MO

2

Filter region by selecting Malaysia (MY) and search merchant by BID.

3

Click View Details

4

Locate the Store Grab ID provided by GrabPay. Click the pen icon to edit and input this value into the Merchant External ID field.


5

Click Save then click Action > Activate

6

In case there’s an error or issue with activation through Admin Dashboard, activation can be done manually using retool.

7

Insert merchant’s BID and select MY Payex PLT

8

Choose the payment mode.

9

Fill the approved Store Grab ID from GrabPay.

Note: If you want to activate Both One time Payment and Tokenized payment mode, you need to do these flow 2 times using the same Store Grab ID.

10

Click next.

11

Click Activate.

You should see success message and the payment method should be activated now on merchant’s end

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

Navigate to Admin Dashboard > Channel Approvals and Activations.

MO

2.

Set filter to Malaysia (MY) and search by BID.

3.

Click the three dots (⋮) and select Reject.
